creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
As far as I can tell, the certificates on the Malaysian mirror are correct.

E.g., this works fine:

curl --connect-to download.freebsd.org:443:ftp0.kul.freebsd.org:443 https://download.freebsd.org

You could try downloading over plain HTTP or FTP and compare the checksums against a securely downloaded checksums file.
